description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). In the "Computer Science Fundamentals" (CS110) course, create a Choice activity named "Preferred Programming Language" with the description "Choose your preferred programming language for the course project. This will help us form balanced project teams." The activity must include four options: "Python", "Java", "C++", and "JavaScript". Configure the settings to allow students to update their choice and to always show results to students.
